title: Samsung Reshapes Smartphones with Galaxy Z Fold8
description: Recent reports from Australian media highlight the arrival of the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 series, detailing availability and design changes.

sources.title: Samsung's Galaxy Z Fold8 series lands at Telstra: pre-order and launch details
Samsung reshapes the smartphone with the Galaxy Z Fold8
Watch 9News Latest Stories - Season 2026 - Samsung's foldable surprise

sections.heading: Telstra Availability
paragraphs: According to Telstra, the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 series has landed at their network. The provider has released information regarding pre-order and launch details for the device.

sections.heading: Design Changes
paragraphs: Nine.com.au reports that Samsung is reshaping the smartphone with the Galaxy Z Fold8. The coverage focuses on the new form factor introduced by the company.

sections.heading: News Coverage
paragraphs: 9Now has featured the device in their '9News Latest Stories' for the 2026 season. The segment refers to the release as Samsung's foldable surprise.

faq.q: What has been reported about the Galaxy Z Fold8's availability?
faq.a: Telstra states that the Galaxy Z Fold8 series has landed at their network, offering pre-order and launch details.

faq.q: How is the new device described by media outlets?
faq.a: Nine.com.au describes the device as reshaping the smartphone, while 9Now refers to it as a foldable surprise.
